sizing_rule.note: Position size adjusted dynamically by measured distributional parameters (kurtosis, skewness, scale) of quantified scenarios. Requires scenario analysis and distribution fitting before position allocation. Author silent on specific optimal_f value, kelly_fraction, and max_drawdown_tolerance thresholds.

source_rule_text: Allocate resources based on quantified scenario planning analysis, adjusting position size according to distributional parameters (kurtosis, skewness, scale) of multiple future scenarios to optimize for the actual market distribution.
